prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-CUTLERYSET-7PC-44126 Product Type: KNIFE_BLOCK_SET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Beille 13pc Kitchen Knife Set Cooking Baking Supplies Meal Prep with Wood Storage Block Description: If you've been meaning to upgrade your kitchen knife set or are looking to purchase your first full knife set, look no further than the Beille 13pc Stainless Steel Kitchen Cooking Baking Supplies Meal Prep Knife Set with Wood Storage Block and scissors.

The knife set is constructed from durable stainless steel that ensures optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing, while the black, ergonomic handles provide comfort and confidence when handling; this knife set will easily meet all your food prep needs, whether you're making an easy summer salad, preparing salmon, mincing meat or chopping herbs for roasted potatoes. The knife set is dishwasher safe (although hand washing is recommended), and will tuck tidily away in the included wood block for easy storage.

The highlight of this knife set is the Santoku chef knife. Specifically, the Santoku's blade and handle are designed to work in harmony, by matching the blade's width and weight to the weight of the tang and the handle. Covering a ton of ground in your kitchen, this chef knife can prep, cut, chop and slice just about everything. It can be used for everything from mincing, slicing and chopping fruit and vegetables, to slicing meet or disjointing large cuts of poultry Search Terms: chef knives knife blocks block sets cooking cutting serrated magnetic strip stainless steel kitchen master multi tool for the Features: - QUALITY KNIFE SET: The knife set is constructed from quality, stainless steel that ensures optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing, while the black ergonomic handles provide comfort and confidence when handling; a kitchen essential for all cooking, baking and meal prep needs - ESSENTIAL SANTOKU CHEF KNIFE: This comprehensive knife set features a must have Santoku chef's knife that will cover a ton of ground in your kitchen; the Santoku's blade and handle are designed to work in harmony, by matching the blade's width and weight to the weight of the tang and the handle - EASY CLEANING AND STORAGE: Dishwasher safe but hand washing is recommended; rust and corrosion resistant, all the components of the knife set fit tidily into the wood block for easy storage; this knife set will look stylish and modern on any kitchen counter, kitchen island or food prep station - 13PC KITCHEN MEAL PREP KNIFE SET INCLUDES: Your set includes 1 Santoku chef's knife, carving knife, boning knife, pairing knife, utility knife, 8 table steak knives, black kitchen scissors or shears and wood block for countertop storage - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14 x 6.5 x 4.5 inches; Weight: 4.6lbs; Materials: Stainless steel knives, wood storage block, ABS handles === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13pc Kitchen Knife Set with Wood Block
